mapper.select: SELECT A.USER_ID , A.HOSP_CD , A.USER_NM , A.DEPT_NM , A.ROLE_CD , A.USE_YN , A.REG_DT , B.HOSP_NM FROM TW_USER A INNER JOIN TW_COMPANY B ON B.HOSP_CD = A.HOSP_CD WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.USER_PW = #{userPw} AND A.HOSP_CD = #{hospCd} AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT HOSP_CD , HOSP_NM , COMP_TYPE , BED_CNT FROM TW_COMPANY WHERE HOSP_CD = #{hospCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT * FROM TW_USER WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY USER_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TW_USER (USER_ID, HOSP_CD, USER_NM, USER_PW, DEPT_NM, ROLE_CD, USE_YN) VALUES (#{userId}, #{hospCd}, #{userNm}, #{userPw}, #{deptNm}, #{roleCd}, 'Y')
